title: SEC2: duplicated lwd_endpoints build at startup
description: In commands.rs chat(), the endpoint-building logic (if let Some(url) = lightwalletd { vec![url.clone()] } else { match network { ... } }) is written twice: once for send_fn_box (~line 198) and once for spawn_block_watcher (~line 395). This produces two separate Vec<String> allocations with identical content. Fix: extract a helper fn build_lwd_endpoints(lightwalletd: Option<&str>, network: ZcashNetwork) -> Vec<String> called once; share the result (or Arc it) between send_fn_box and spawn_block_watcher. Eliminates duplicate allocation and the maintenance risk of the two copies diverging.
